HediffDef.label: baby bond
HediffDef.description: A supernatural link has formed between this creature and the baby it converted. The feeder feels the baby's emotional state as if it were their own, and will not survive the death of their bonded child.

HediffDef.label: blood bond
HediffDef.description: This child is bound to the creature that converted them. If this child dies, the bond will kill their feeder.

li.label: bonded child is miserable
li.description: The child I converted is suffering terribly. Their pain echoes through the bond.

li.label: bonded child is sad
li.description: My bonded child is unhappy. I feel their distress.

li.label: bonded child is content
li.description: My bonded child feels neither joy nor sorrow. The bond is quiet.

li.label: bonded child is happy
li.description: My bonded child is doing well. Their warmth reaches me through the bond.

li.label: bonded child is joyful
li.description: My bonded child radiates joy. The bond fills me with a reflected happiness.
